name: claude-abap-skills
description: Opinionated skill library for Claude Code targeting modern ABAP development — BTP ABAP Environment and S/4HANA 2023+ in the ABAP Cloud development model. Two independent plugins: clean-abap (universal Clean ABAP rules) and abap-cloud-rap (clean core, RAP behavior design, CDS layering, ATC remediation). Install one or both — they do not load each other at runtime. Assumes the official SAP ABAP MCP Server (SAPSE.adt-vscode) provides system access.

metadata.description: 5 ABAP skills across 2 independent plugins. Targets BTP ABAP Environment and S/4HANA 2023+ in ABAP Cloud development model. Not for ECC, pre-2023 on-prem, or classic ABAP.

plugins.name: clean-abap
plugins.description: Universal Clean ABAP rules plus two skills: review and refactor. Skills load the rule set from CLAUDE.md on invocation — no always-on context cost beyond skill descriptions. Targets modern ABAP only — BTP ABAP Environment or S/4HANA 2023+ in the ABAP Cloud development model.

plugins.name: abap-cloud-rap
plugins.description: ABAP Cloud / RAP overlay plus three skills: rap-bo-design (build a full RAP BO via the official SAP ADT MCP generators), atc-remediation (walk ATC findings methodically), clean-core-check (audit clean core compliance). Self-contained; install the clean-abap plugin separately if you also want the universal Clean ABAP review and refactor skills. Targets BTP ABAP Environment and S/4HANA 2023+ in the ABAP Cloud development model.
